FOLLOWING THE COURSE STRUCTURE
The structure has been designed bottom up, to enhance your strategies with many never
seen before strategies and concepts which I use every day with the accounts I manage,
including my own.
The structure is not designed to force you down each module - instead, I recommend
those that are less confident to follow each module sequentially and for those with more
experience/higher spends to dive into the areas they're most likely to find the most
immediate benefits from.
Below is a full break down of the course as a reference point.
If you can't see the modules in the menu then you will need to upgrade your free
account.
00:00 / 20:42
MODULE 1: FOUNDATIONS
> The 4 Funnel System - How to create and structure an account to help you optimise
your results better. I've used this since 2014 to bring better structure, budget control
ability and analysis to my accounts, making it easier to profit and scale. It will differ
based on niche and objective and I focus mainly on Ecom and Lead Gen by way of
examples.
Level: Basic / Intermediate
> Pixel Mastery - Key areas to focus on beyond just installing your pixel, such as
additional custom conversions/events and how to use the pixel data to support analysis
and optimisation
Level: Intermediate
> Data Setup - A couple of videos to get you started in setting up your data in the right
way to support analysis, decision making and optimisation.
Level: Basic / Intermediate
> The 3N Ads Formula - One of my favourite sections on getting your ad to stick out,
engage and convert. I take you through some examples of ads that I've found or created
to illustrate tricks and tips to cut through the noise.
Level: Basic / Intermediate
> Audience & Funnel Cheatsheet - a breakdown of audiences to use and at what stage in
the funnel to use them, intended to be downloaded and referenced as and when you
need it.
Level: Basic / Intermediate
MODULE 2: TEST
This module is a crucial part of making your campaigns work for you, by giving you the
tools and process to test ads and audiences in a way which minimises wasted spend and
maximises your time.
> The Graduation Framework - My signature strategy that's served me well for so many
years, despite the changes within Facebook, teaching you how to test audiences and
creatives efficiently without wasting spend.
A must-view for all level of marketers, including demos and a FAQ sheet based on
questions received from fellow students.
Level: Basic / Intermediate
> STAR Method Testing - A simple but effective way of running and tracking tests
including a Trello swipe board you can use right now to track and control your testing.
Level: Basic / Intermediate
MODULE 3: OPTIMISE
> Analysis & Decision Making - How to analyse and make decisions on where to place
your focus depending on your goals for the account. Includes the metrics I look at,
taking control of CPA & ROAS (Ecom and Digital Product relevant), a CPA calculator swipe
file, insights on Delivery Insights and an introduction to Facebook Analytics.
A must-view for all level of marketers, including demos and a FAQ sheet based on
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 2 --

questions received from fellow students.
Level: Intermediate / Advanced
> The Ads Sniper Strategy - The Ads Sniper Strategy focusses on cutting bad performing
ads, based on ad set performance (and applies to ad sets). A simple yet powerful
technique to get your cost per Lead/Reg/Install/Purchase etc down across your account
quickly and effectively. Full example including how to use Filters & Reports to speed up
analysis and decision making.
Level: Intermediate / Advanced
> Sales Funnel Optimisation - How to optimise your sales funnel, including a Live
analysis of funnel metrics, how to spy on your website visitors, interrogating them for
insights and how this impacts your cost per lead/reg/acquisition.
Level: Intermediate / Advanced
MODULE 4: GROW
> Introduction To Scaling - Whilst I cover off scaling strategies, this is an important part
of scaling by helping you understand how the auction works. My time spent Day Trading
currencies has helped me better understand the auction and how scaling works,
covering the Campaign Objectives and why/when/how to use them, mindset training to
help move you from irrational to data-driven decision making, together with risk-
tolerance and introducing the scaling strategies I deploy.
Level: Intermediate / Advanced
> Scaling Strategies: V-Scaling - The most basic form of scaling, which is increasing your
spend by no more than 20%. I provide a demo of how I do this and what to look out for
Level: Intermediate
> Scaling Strategies: H-Scaling - A more advanced form of scaling, which offers faster
scaling with higher risk. Designed for those that are fully on top of metrics and analysis,
able to take quick decisions and looking for faster growth than the V-Scaling route
including a demo of conducting this for a client that required fast growth to $5k spend
per day from zero within 30 days.
Level: Advanced
> BOSS The Auction with Manual Bidding - A detailed look through of how the auction
actually works, having spent many hours with Facebook's engineers deconstructing it,
using publicly available data and having run many tests, to give you the lowdown on how
to make the auction work for you and what role manual bidding plays.
Level: Advanced
> Automation & Rules - Automation allows you to run your account on semi-auto pilot,
as long as you define and test the rules that work for your account. No rules will 100%
work for me as it will for you, so this lesson introduces you to the tool I prefer to use, the
rules I like to implement, which cover Ads Sniper and Scaling in particular, plus alerts to
ensure I remain on top of multiple campaigns and specifically for me, multiple
accounts/clients to be able to scale multiple accounts together.
Level: Advanced
BONUS SECTION
> Mastermind Calls - A link to all past live calls with notes to help determine which are of
interest to you.
> Bonus material - A section which contains links to articles, documents and downloads
related to trouble shooting, growth tools, case studies, additional masterclasses and
guides
If you have questions on this as a paid member, go ahead and fire them into the
Mastermind where myself, my team and your peers will be able to help.
Onwards and Upwards!
